states.description: Android app drawer listing all installed apps
Default Downloads folder view in Files app
Side navigation drawer for switching categories/storage

visual_cues: system folders (Alarms, Android, DCIM, Documents, Download, Movies, Music, Pictures, Recordings, Ringtones)

states.description: Inside a specific subfolder (e.g., Recordings, Ringtones, Documents)
Overflow dropdown menu opened from three-dot icon
visual_cues: Show hidden files / Don't show hidden files

states.description: Dialog prompting for new folder name
Search interface with input bar and filter chips
Search results with optional filters and scope indicator

strategies.name: OPEN_FILES_APP
steps: Swipe up from bottom to open app drawer
Wait for app to load to Downloads view
strategies.success_signal: Downloads header visible with filter chips
strategies.fallback: If long-press menu appears, press Back; if launcher unresponsive dialog appears, click Wait or Close app and retry

strategies.name: FILTER_IN_DOWNLOADS
steps: Optionally tap additional chips to combine filters
Verify chip(s) highlighted blue with checkmark
strategies.success_signal: Chip(s) highlighted; either results shown or 'No matches in Downloads'
strategies.fallback: If wrong scope, open hamburger menu and switch to global category

strategies.name: NAVIGATE_TO_GLOBAL_CATEGORY
strategies.success_signal: Header shows category name; aggregated folders/files appear
strategies.fallback: If accidentally tapped wrong item, reopen drawer and re-select

strategies.name: NAVIGATE_TO_INTERNAL_STORAGE_ROOT
steps: Tap device internal storage entry (e.g., sdk_gphone64_arm64)
Verify standard root folders visible (Alarms, Android, DCIM, etc.)
strategies.success_signal: Header shows device name; root folder grid visible

strategies.name: CREATE_NEW_FOLDER
strategies.preconditions: Inside a physical directory (Downloads, internal storage, or a subfolder), NOT inside a category aggregate view
steps: Type the folder name in the dialog text field
strategies.success_signal: New folder appears in the directory listing
strategies.fallback: If 'New folder' option not visible, navigate to internal storage or a real folder (category views like Audio/Documents do not allow creation)

strategies.name: SORT_FILES
steps: Select desired sort option (Name A-Z/Z-A, Modified newest/oldest, Size largest/smallest)
strategies.success_signal: Sort sheet closes; chosen option marked as active when reopened

strategies.name: TOGGLE_HIDDEN_FILES
strategies.success_signal: Menu closes; reopening shows 'Don't show hidden files'

strategies.name: TOGGLE_VIEW_LAYOUT
steps: Locate view toggle icon on right side under filter chips
Note: icon shown represents the OPPOSITE of current layout
strategies.success_signal: File items rearrange between list rows and grid tiles
strategies.fallback: If unclear, click toggle once more and observe layout change

strategies.name: SEARCH_WITH_FILTER
strategies.preconditions: Files app open at desired scope (folder or category)
steps: Submit via keyboard or wait for live results
strategies.success_signal: Query shown in search bar; filter chip highlighted; results or 'No matches in <scope>' displayed
strategies.fallback: If 'No matches', press back and broaden scope (switch to internal storage root or a global category), then re-search

strategies.name: COUNT_OR_VERIFY_FILES
steps: Scroll to ensure all matching items visible
Provide numeric answer or Yes/No based on presence
strategies.fallback: If list extends, scroll up and down to capture all entries

strategies.name: REMOVE_SEARCH_HISTORY_ENTRY
steps: Open search view from any scope
Locate desired query in recent search history
Tap the 'x' next to the entry to remove it
strategies.success_signal: Entry no longer in history when search reopened

dead_ends.note: Aggregated category views (Audio/Images/Videos/Documents) do not expose 'New folder'. Must navigate to internal storage or a real subdirectory.

dead_ends.failed_action: Tap filter chip expecting global scope
dead_ends.note: Filter chips on Downloads only filter Downloads contents, not device-wide. Use hamburger menu to reach global category.

dead_ends.failed_action: Search within a specific empty folder
dead_ends.note: Search scope is restricted to current folder (e.g., 'No matches in Downloads'). Back out and search from a broader scope.

dead_ends.failed_action: Swipe up too slowly / from wrong area
dead_ends.note: Triggers wallpaper/widgets menu instead of app drawer; press Back and retry with a clear bottom-up swipe.
Causes 'Pixel Launcher isn't responding' dialog; select Wait or Close app to recover.

dead_ends.failed_action: Type before search field has focus
dead_ends.note: Text input may not register; tap the search bar first to ensure focus before typing.

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO
categories.precondition: Application launched or accessible from launcher; target location identifiable in navigation hierarchy
abstract_steps: Launch the app via launcher or app drawer if not in foreground
Open primary navigation (side drawer/menu) if target is outside default landing
Select the target top-level section or storage root
Drill into subfolders by tapping their entries
Confirm location via header/breadcrumb
failure_modes: Tapping a filter chip instead of switching the actual scope
Selecting a similarly named adjacent item
Confusing aggregated category views with physical directories
verification_checklist: Header/title matches target location
Breadcrumb path reflects expected hierarchy
Available actions match expected directory type

categories.name: ADD_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Inside a writable container/directory that supports creation
abstract_steps: Open overflow/options menu in the container
Choose 'create new' action
Enter the requested name in the prompted input
Confirm creation
failure_modes: Attempting creation inside a read-only or aggregated/virtual view
Submitting without focusing the input field
Naming collisions or invalid characters
verification_checklist: New entry visible in the current listing
Name matches the requested string exactly
Entry is located in the correct parent container

categories.name: FILTER_ENTRIES
categories.precondition: Listing view with available filter controls
abstract_steps: Identify filter chips or controls
Toggle one or more filters relevant to the request
Confirm each selected filter is highlighted/active
Observe result list updates
failure_modes: Applying filter within a narrow scope when a global scope was intended
Forgetting to combine multiple filters when required
Misinterpreting empty results as task failure when filter was correctly applied
verification_checklist: All requested filters show active/selected state
Scope indicator matches intended location
Result count consistent with filter combination

categories.name: SORT_ENTRIES
categories.precondition: Listing view with sort controls available via menu
abstract_steps: Open overflow/options menu
Choose sort action
Select desired sort criterion and order
failure_modes: Selecting a similar but incorrect criterion (e.g., wrong direction)
Sort controls unavailable in aggregated views
verification_checklist: Reopening sort shows the chosen option marked
Order of visible items matches the criterion

categories.name: CHANGE_VIEW_LAYOUT
categories.precondition: Listing view with a layout toggle
abstract_steps: Locate the layout toggle control
Tap to switch between list and grid
Observe item arrangement change
failure_modes: Misreading icon semantics (icon often depicts the OPPOSITE layout)
Repeated toggling that returns to the original layout
verification_checklist: Item arrangement matches target layout
Toggle icon now depicts the alternate layout

categories.name: TOGGLE_SETTING
categories.precondition: Container with a binary view/option in its menu
abstract_steps: Open overflow menu
Tap the option to flip its state
failure_modes: Option not present in current scope/view
verification_checklist: Reopening menu shows the inverted label or checked state

categories.name: SEARCH_QUERY
categories.precondition: App provides a search affordance reachable from current scope
abstract_steps: Activate search control
Ensure input field is focused
Type the query
Optionally apply type/category filters
Submit or rely on live search
failure_modes: Searching within a narrow scope when target may be elsewhere
Typing before focus is set causing lost input
Treating empty result set as conclusive without broadening scope
verification_checklist: Query string visible in search bar
Active filters match request
Scope indicator reflects intended breadth

categories.name: QUERY_INFO
categories.precondition: Information is discoverable via navigation, filter, or search
abstract_steps: Navigate to the most relevant scope
Apply any filters needed to isolate the subset
Scroll fully to enumerate or inspect items
Derive the answer (count, presence, name, recency)
failure_modes: Counting only the visible portion without scrolling
Confusing aggregated vs physical directory contents
Misreading truncated names in grid view
verification_checklist: All matching items have been viewed
Layout chosen allows reading full names if needed
Final answer format matches request (number, yes/no, name)

categories.name: DELETE_ENTRY
categories.precondition: An identifiable entry exists in current scope and a removal control is available
abstract_steps: Locate the target entry in the listing or history
Activate the per-item delete/remove control
Confirm removal if prompted
failure_modes: Misidentifying a similarly named entry
Removal control hidden by keyboard or off-screen
verification_checklist: Entry no longer present after refresh
No unintended entries were removed

categories.name: RECOVER_FROM_LAUNCHER_ISSUES
categories.precondition: Unexpected system dialog or wrong app launched
abstract_steps: Dismiss popups via Back or Wait/Close
Return to home via Home button
Re-initiate the intended navigation
failure_modes: Repeating the same failing gesture without recovery
Accidentally launching unrelated apps from a customization menu
verification_checklist: Home screen or app drawer is reachable
Target app launches and reaches expected landing state
